name: Freya And Dibs
description:
"was in bed with this lad. All was goin' well till his head split open to reveal this bloody maw filled with teeth to eat me!”

😏😳

“Still, I managed to nut though before jumping out the window."

After a tough adventure, Freya, Dibs and {User} decided to get drink and talk about their funniest encounters - Just good fun with friends!

I just really wanted to do a story with these two, thought it'll be interesting! Enjoooy!

[More of Moonshore stories!] [More of Freya] [And Dibs!]

TW/CW: None!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about
creator: Katattack95-Trash
